overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), starting at a busy intersection with towering neon-lit skyscrapers, crossing the street, and proceeding through increasingly narrow urban alleys. The environment features a mix of high-tech digital billboards, industrial architecture, and gritty street-level details.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. The camera waits at the crosswalk as vehicles including a yellow taxi pass by, then begins crossing the asphalt street toward the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with distinctive red pavement

events.description: steps onto red paved pedestrian walkway from the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the red pedestrian path, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt walking ahead on the red path

entered.detail: distinctive red colored pavement section for pedestrians
massive orange industrial pillar with rivets and warning stripes
building facade covered in large digital advertisement screens
green metal barrier separating walkway from street

segments.scene_description: Moving onto a distinctive red-paved pedestrian walkway, the scene features massive orange industrial support columns on the left and building facades covered in digital billboards on the right. The camera follows the flow of pedestrians along this path, with the glass towers now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated transit structure

events.description: enters covered area beneath the elevated transit structure
lighting becomes slightly dimmer under the overhead structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered transit structure, passing closed storefronts

notable_agents.action: person with purple hair standing near a storefront

entered.detail: overhead covering from the elevated train track above the walkway
commercial entrance with glowing purple and blue signage

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues under a covered transit structure that provides partial shelter. The orange support columns dominate the left side while closed storefronts with neon signs line the right. The environment feels more enclosed as the camera moves deeper under the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with gang graffiti and red lanterns

events.description: turns into narrow alleyway marked with Tyger Claws graffiti

agents.ego_description: entering the narrow alley, walking past graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: person walking away down the narrow passage ahead

entered.detail: wall covered in colorful graffiti featuring the Tyger Claws gang tag
traditional red hanging lanterns suspended above the alley
industrial building facade with corrugated metal panels
bright red and yellow automated vending machine

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow alleyway marked by prominent Tyger Claws gang graffiti on the left wall. Red paper lanterns hang overhead, and the space becomes enclosed by corrugated metal buildings. A vending machine stands on the right as the camera proceeds deeper into the alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial back alley with vending machines and neon signs

events.description: passes by multiple vending machines and neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrow alley, passing vending machines and debris

entered.detail: bright pink and blue neon signs for various shops
scattered trash bags and cardboard on the ground

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the narrow commercial alley, now dominated by bright neon signs and multiple vending machines lining the walls. The ground shows scattered debris and trash, while the tall buildings on both sides create a canyon-like effect as the camera moves toward the alley's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit city intersection into the claustrophobic depths of a gritty urban alleyway. It begins at a bustling crosswalk surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers and passing yellow taxis, moving across the asphalt toward the opposite sidewalk. As the camera steps onto a red-paved pedestrian walkway, the open vista shifts into a more structured environment defined by massive orange industrial columns and digital billboards. The scene then becomes increasingly enclosed as it passes under a covered transit structure with neon-lit storefronts before turning into a narrow alley marked by gang graffiti and hanging red lanterns. Finally, the space tightens into a canyon-like commercial corridor lined with vending machines and scattered debris, moving deeper into the shadows of the surrounding corrugated metal buildings.
